mano_cua.result_summary: Chrome中设置深色主题后多次刷新（普通刷新+硬刷新），页面始终直接以深色模式渲染，未观察到白色闪烁。页面源码分析确认使用了data-next-hide-fouc机制（body{display:none}+内联脚本从localStorage读取主题）有效防止FOUC。主题切换Light/Dark功能正常。此bug原报告为Brave浏览器特有问题。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The application correctly implements FOUC prevention for dark mode. When the theme is set to Dark and the page is refreshed multiple times (both regular and hard refresh), the page consistently loads in dark mode without any visible white flash. Technical evidence: uses data-next-hide-fouc with body{display:none} to hide page during theme application, uses inline script to read from localStorage and apply theme before rendering.
